reconciliation_note: Operator-submitted v2.1.1 max-power work order was rebound onto the existing current-head campaign identity so KT keeps one active authority anchor instead of spawning a parallel packet family.

doctrine.breadth_rule: Keep broad advancement objectives alive in governed noncanonical lanes while canonical promotion stays evidence-serial and blocker-driven.
doctrine.mutation_rule: Do not reopen closed current-head blockers without direct counterevidence. Do not let same-host evidence narratively upgrade externality.

governing_summary.primary_mission: Freeze what current head has honestly closed, isolate the one canonical blocker that remains open, and preserve larger router, multilope, growth, comparative, and product ambitions as governed advancement rather than counterfeit current-head truth.
governing_summary.current_head_boundary: C007, C016A, C016B, and C005 are closed on current head. C006 remains the only major open canonical blocker. Learned-router superiority, multi-lobe promotion, broader externality, comparative proof, and product widening remain unearned.
governing_summary.next_lawful_move: C006 only in the authoritative lane; broader proving and advancement work may continue only as noncanonical preparation.

allowed_noncanonical_parallelism: trust substrate preparation that does not raise externality above E1
governed lab work for router superiority and multi-lobe promotion
growth and civilization proving that does not mutate canonical truth
narrow product and comparative prep that does not widen current-head claims
forbidden_reopens: router blocker reopening without new counterevidence
same-host evidence narrated as outsider or cross-host trust

execution_state.router_boundary: Current-head router closure is a ratified static hold, not abandonment of router superiority or multi-lobe ambition.
execution_state.externality_boundary: Current-head externality remains bounded at E1 until direct E2, E3, or E4 evidence is earned.
